name: deepseek-code
description: Terminal-native AI coding agent powered by DeepSeek

scripts.build: bun build src/index.tsx --outdir ./dist --target bun --external react-devtools-core && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bun\n' | cat - ./dist/index.js > ./dist/tmp && mv ./dist/tmp ./dist/index.js && chmod +x ./dist/index.js
